message:
Complete migration to pure Zig compiler pipeline

Replaced Python bridge with native Zig lexer/parser/codegen:
- Updated src/main.zig to use Zig lexer → parser → codegen
- Removed getPythonAst() Python bridge function
- Fixed compiler.zig for Zig 0.15.2 API (tmp file creation)
- Fixed codegen to generate valid main() signature (!void not CodegenError!void)
- Added semicolons to expression statements

Full pipeline now working:
- Lexer (529 lines): Tokenizes Python source
- Parser (770 lines): Builds native AST
- Codegen (681 lines): Generates Zig code
- Compiler: Compiles to native binary

Test: x=5; y=10; z=x+y; print(z) → binary outputs 15

Giant file status:
- Only packages/core/codegen/generator.py (2559 lines) remains
- This is OLD Python codegen, replaced by src/codegen.zig (681 lines)
- Python code kept for backward compatibility with Python CLI
- Can be removed once Zig binary is properly installed
